{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322193759167FDF74C06B8AC50938"}"},"total":10},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7558825701617861401","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超级好看，谢谢作者大大继续努力，加油写更好看的作品给大家看看吧，谢谢运动员为国争光，很厉害，真棒棒哒。为国家运动员加油[赞][赞][赞][赞][赞][赞][赞][赞][赞][赞][赞][赞][赞][赞][赞][赞][赞][赞][赞][赞][赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1759927929,"group_id":"7538795902824090648","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx33Uv0Z1bUw2iFkX5ZnsWM=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"676941390684014","user_name":"用户67694139"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"676941390684014","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1716462442,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7538795902824090648","book_info":{"abstract":"【体育+奥运+短跑】2024 年，38 岁的国家一级短跑运动员林峰在一次老友聚会上，还在吹嘘着2021苏丙天在东京奥运会半决赛上打破亚洲纪录。听闻当年的竞争对手仍活跃在教练岗位，培养出了一批又一批短跑新星，心中满是遗憾。他曾因 2008 年一次意外的跟腱断裂，不得不提前结束职业生涯，错失了为国争光的最佳时机。带着这份不甘，林峰在醉酒后沉沉睡去，再次醒来，竟发现自己回到了 2005 年，彼时他刚满 19 岁，正处于短跑生涯的黄金上升期，一切都还来得及。
重活一世，林峰凭借着未来十几年的训练经验、赛事记忆以及对短跑技术发展的深刻理解，决心弥补前世的遗憾。他要避开伤病的陷阱，改进技术动作，提升竞技水平，从市队到省队，再到国家队，一步步站上更高的赛场，在 2008 年北京奥运会、2012 年伦敦奥运会等国际大赛中，为华夏短跑书写新的传奇，让五星红旗在百米赛道上冉冉升起。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o9f1c5a0620f5c22bddbda6716b9774f5~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"有源无分","author_id":"","book_id":"7538795902824090648","book_name":"重生2005：百米飞人再启程","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d86040","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":15,"name":"体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=15&name=体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7538796268865208856","read_count":"691","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"316047"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"154","tags":"游戏体育,体育,重生,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o9f1c5a0620f5c22bddbda6716b9774f5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779363479&x-signature=0XGLmi8Z%2F1RlsiMi%2BMFCbKekcjI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3872943665584467","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"196"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322193759167FDF74C06B8AC50938"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":15861,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":23573,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":100},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},
